heading: Our Story
intro: The McDevitt Company was founded in 1997 by Wade McDevitt with the goal of becoming one of the finest, full-service real estate firms in the world. With offices in Philadelphia, Greenwich, Nashville, Palm Beach, Chicago, Los Angeles, London, and Amsterdam, our experienced and highly creative team has a deep understanding of the most compelling retail and gathering environments throughout the world, as well as a wide breadth of industry knowledge and relationships.
mission: As a full-service real estate firm, The McDevitt Company partners to create strategic visions for places, compelling marketing packages and comprehensive leasing plans focused on the long term success of our clients and their assets. Recognizing that there is both an art and science to real estate decisions, we focus our efforts on creating an all-inclusive formula for success that draws from our in-house data science department, the global market knowledge of our dealmakers, and the skill of our project managers.
vision: We collaborate with select landlords and developers to create unique and distinctive retail destinations — bringing together targeted, best-in-class tenants in transformational and innovative retail environments.
capabilities: Using our broad knowledge of major markets, developments, and tenants throughout the world — we are able to curate unique and compelling merchandising plans with an appropriate leasing vision.
